replies.msg:
我以為大城市會好d
請問會閂一星期定係澳洲法定假期果1，2日？

I went to australia on vacation before which failed to satisfy our expectations. The people are rude and racist. The food is mediocre. If you ask me if it's a great place to holiday in, don't bet on it. There's nothing worth doing there. The holiday was beneath my expectation.
基本上你當好似十幾年前香港嘅新年咁 無乜店會開
